name: 悪魔の家 -6 Day Nightmare-
short_description: You are trapped in a nightmare. Observe the house and try to escape from this nightmare.
detailed_description:
You are trapped in a nightmare.

Observe the house and try to escape from this nightmare.

Do not miss anything unusual.

If you find something unusual, use the tools on the table in the living room.

If you do not find anything strange, sleep in your bed.

If you don't find anything unusual, go to bed.

To go out of the house through the front door on the "6th" when there is no anomaly.

If you make a wrong choice, you will be returned to "day 1".

Duration

30~60 minutes

About video distribution

You may distribute your video without permission, regardless of whether you are an individual or a corporation.

Monetization is possible only when you use the functions provided by the video distribution site.

We would appreciate it if you include the name of the game in the title of the video and distribution, and a link to the Steam page in the summary section.
